normalized_title: Statement of Planning Policy No. 2 - Environment and Natural Resources Policy (SPP 2.0)
scope_summary: Broad sector policy applying throughout Western Australia that integrates environment and natural resource management into land use planning and decision-making. It sets policy measures for water resources, air quality, soil and land quality, biodiversity, agricultural land and rangelands, minerals/petroleum/basic raw materials, marine resources and aquaculture, landscape, and greenhouse gas emissions/energy efficiency. It is implemented through planning strategies, schemes and decision-making rather than prescribing development standards.

key_numeric_standards.applies_to: identification of floodways and flood-affected land in planning strategies, schemes and decision-making

cross_references.cited: Statement of Planning Policy No. 8: State Planning Framework Policy
State Gravel Supply Strategy (Main Roads WA, 1998)

quality_flags: source is the WAPC web reference copy of SPP 2.0 - the standard reference disclaimer banner is interleaved through the text but the policy content is intact and matches the 10 June 2003 gazettal (Special Gazette No. 90)
bullet characters mis-decoded as 'ss' (eszett) throughout lists
summary.json title field captured the disclaimer banner rather than the policy title; the analysis.json normalized_title is correct

policy was made under the repealed Town Planning and Development Act 1928 (s5AA) but continues in effect under the Planning and Development Act 2005 as SPP 2.0; predates the current SPP numbering style
